_readme: Assets the research engine studies. Add any Yahoo Finance ticker. 'valuation': true attempts a current trailing P/E (works for some equity ETFs/stocks, never for commodities). 'use_revision_tags': true applies scripts/regime_config.json tags (only meaningful for semis-complex assets). 'query' is the news-search phrase for the sentiment layer.
_analog_map_readme: Nearest sector-analog peer for the TearSheet's relative-strip comparison (redesign directive Stage F2c). Ticker not listed, or mapped to null, means 'no sector analog' -- the UI must say so honestly rather than force a comparison.
